title: capnites pumilus
intro: Capnites pumilus is a type of succulent plant, commonly known as the 'pygmy desert marigold', that belongs to the family Brassicaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and infections. The health benefits of Capnites pumilus include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Capnites pumilus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it accessible for use in traditional remedies.
